sentences.target: Der Inhalt der Flasche riecht ein bisschen sauer.
sentences.reading: /deːɐ̯ ˈɪn halt deːɐ̯ ˈflaʃə ʁiːçt aɪ̯n ˈbɪsçən ˈzaʊ̯ɐ/

translations.de: Der Inhalt der Flasche riecht ein bisschen sauer.
translations.ipa: /deːɐ̯ ˈɪn halt deːɐ̯ ˈflaʃə ʁiːçt aɪ̯n ˈbɪsçən ˈzaʊ̯ɐ/
translations.en: The contents of the bottle smell a bit sour.
translations.es: El contenido de la botella huele un poco agrio.
translations.fr: Le contenu de la bouteille sent un peu acide.
translations.it: Il contenuto della bottiglia ha un odore un po' acido.
translations.ko: 병 안에 든 내용물이 좀 시큼한 냄새가 나요.
translations.zh-Hans: 瓶子里的东西闻起来有点酸。
translations.yue: 樽入面啲嘢聞起嚟有啲酸味。
translations.pt: O conteúdo da garrafa cheira um pouco azedo.
translations.vi: Trong chai có mùi hơi chua.
translations.nl: De inhoud van de fles ruikt een beetje zuur.
translations.hu: A palack tartalma kicsit savanyú szagú.
translations.hi: बोतल के अंदर की चीज़ में थोड़ी खट्टी गंध है।
translations.el: Το περιεχόμενο του μπουκαλιού μυρίζει λίγο ξινά.
translations.nb: Innholdet i flasken lukter litt surt.
translations.sv: Innehållet i flaskan luktar lite surt.
translations.da: Indholdet i flasken lugter lidt surt.
translations.ja: ボトルの中身は少し酸っぱいにおいがします。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; nominative singular masculine, marking the subject noun 'Inhalt'.
Common noun; head of the subject NP; modified by a genitive attribute ('der Flasche').
Definite article; genitive singular feminine with 'Flasche', forming a genitive attribute.
Common noun; feminine singular; head of the genitive modifier ('der Flasche').
Main verb; 3rd person singular present indicative; takes a predicate adjective ('sauer') and a degree modifier ('ein bisschen').
Indefinite article within the fixed measure phrase 'ein bisschen', functioning as a degree modifier.
Measure noun forming the idiomatic phrase 'ein bisschen'; used adverbially here to indicate degree.
Predicate adjective complement describing the smell; modified by 'ein bisschen'.

sentences.target: Ich kenne den Inhalt des Vertrags nicht.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈkɛnə deːn ˈɪn halt dɛs fɛɐ̯ˈtʁaːks nɪçt/

translations.de: Ich kenne den Inhalt des Vertrags nicht.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈkɛnə deːn ˈɪn halt dɛs fɛɐ̯ˈtʁaːks nɪçt/
translations.en: I don't know what's in the contract.
translations.es: No sé qué dice el contrato.
translations.fr: Je ne sais pas ce qu’il y a dans le contrat.
translations.it: Non so cosa c’è nel contratto.
translations.zh-Hans: 我不知道合同里写了什么。
translations.yue: 我唔知合約入面寫乜嘢。
translations.ru: Я не знаю, что написано в договоре.
translations.pt: Não sei o que está no contrato.
translations.he: אני לא יודע מה כתוב בחוזה.
translations.vi: Tôi không biết trong hợp đồng ghi gì.
translations.ar: لا أعرف ما المكتوب في العقد.
translations.nl: Ik weet niet wat er in het contract staat.
translations.uk: Я не знаю, що написано в договорі.
translations.hu: Nem tudom, mi van a szerződésben.
translations.hi: मुझे नहीं पता कि अनुबंध में क्या लिखा है।
translations.pl: Nie wiem, co jest w umowie.
translations.el: Δεν ξέρω τι γράφει το συμβόλαιο.
translations.nb: Jeg vet ikke hva som står i kontrakten.
translations.id: Saya tidak tahu apa yang tertulis dalam kontrak.
translations.sv: Jag vet inte vad som står i kontraktet.
translations.ro: Nu știu ce scrie în contract.
translations.da: Jeg ved ikke, hvad der står i kontrakten.
translations.ja: 契約書に何が書いてあるか分からない。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; 1st person singular nominative; subject of 'kenne'.
Main verb; 1st person singular present indicative; selects a direct object NP.
Definite article; accusative singular masculine, marking the direct object 'Inhalt'.
Common noun; head of the direct object NP; modified by a genitive ('des Vertrags').
Definite article; genitive singular masculine, marking the genitive modifier with 'Vertrags'.
Common noun; masculine singular genitive; head of the genitive modifier.
Negative particle; negates the clause.

sentences.target: Der Inhalt des Pakets ist für dich.
sentences.reading: /deːɐ̯ ˈɪn halt dɛs paˈkeːts ɪst fyːɐ̯ dɪç/

translations.de: Der Inhalt des Pakets ist für dich.
translations.ipa: /deːɐ̯ ˈɪn halt dɛs paˈkeːts ɪst fyːɐ̯ dɪç/
translations.en: The contents of the package are for you.
translations.es: Lo que hay dentro del paquete es para ti.
translations.fr: Ce qu’il y a dans le colis est pour toi.
translations.it: Quello che c’è nel pacco è per te.
translations.ko: 상자 안에 있는 건 너를 위한 거야.
translations.zh-Hans: 包裹里的东西是给你的。
translations.yue: 包裹入面啲嘢係俾你嘅。
translations.ru: То, что в посылке, для тебя.
translations.pt: O que tem dentro do pacote é para você.
translations.he: מה שיש בתוך החבילה הוא בשבילך.
translations.vi: Đồ bên trong gói hàng là cho bạn.
translations.nl: Wat er in het pakket zit, is voor jou.
translations.uk: Те, що в посилці, для тебе.
translations.hi: पैकेट में जो है, वह तुम्हारे लिए है।
translations.pl: To, co jest w paczce, jest dla ciebie.
translations.el: Ό,τι έχει μέσα το πακέτο είναι για σένα.
translations.nb: Det som er i pakken, er til deg.
translations.sv: Det som finns i paketet är till dig.
translations.ro: Ce e în colet e pentru tine.
translations.cs: To, co je v balíčku, je pro tebe.
translations.da: Det, der er i pakken, er til dig.
translations.ja: 荷物の中身はあなたのためだよ。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; nominative singular masculine, marking the subject noun 'Inhalt'.
Common noun; head of the subject NP; modified by a genitive attribute ('des Pakets').
Definite article; genitive singular (masculine/neuter), here with neuter 'Pakets'.
Common noun; neuter singular genitive; head of the genitive modifier.
Copular auxiliary; 3rd person singular present; links the subject to the predicative PP 'für dich'.
Preposition governing accusative; introduces a beneficiary/recipient PP.
Personal pronoun; 2nd person singular accusative; object of the preposition 'für'.

sentences.target: Sie erklärt mir den Inhalt des Films.
sentences.reading: /ziː ɛʁˈklɛːɐ̯t miːɐ̯ deːn ˈɪn halt dɛs fɪlms/

translations.de: Sie erklärt mir den Inhalt des Films.
translations.ipa: /ziː ɛʁˈklɛːɐ̯t miːɐ̯ deːn ˈɪn halt dɛs fɪlms/
translations.en: She explains the plot to me.
translations.es: Ella me explica la trama de la película.
translations.it: Mi spiega la trama del film.
translations.zh-Hans: 她给我解释电影的剧情。
translations.yue: 佢同我解釋套戲嘅劇情。
translations.pt: Ela me explica a trama do filme.
translations.he: היא מסבירה לי את עלילת הסרט.
translations.vi: Cô ấy giải thích cốt truyện của bộ phim cho tôi.
translations.nl: Ze legt me het verhaal van de film uit.
translations.hi: वह मुझे फिल्म की कहानी समझा रही है।
translations.el: Μου εξηγεί την πλοκή της ταινίας.
translations.nb: Hun forklarer meg handlingen i filmen.
translations.id: Dia menjelaskan alur cerita film itu kepada saya.
translations.sv: Hon förklarar handlingen i filmen för mig.
translations.da: Hun forklarer mig handlingen i filmen.
translations.ja: 彼女が映画のあらすじを説明してくれる。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; nominative (3rd person singular here by agreement); subject of 'erklärt'.

Common noun; head of the direct object NP; modified by a genitive attribute.
